word: H6278 - עֵת קָצִין - ʻÊth Qâtsîyn - ayth kaw-tseen' - Ittahkazin

sections.paragraph:
Original: עת קצין

Transliteration: ‛êth qâtsı̂yn

Phonetic: ayth kaw-tseen'

BDB Definition:

Ittah-kazin = "time of the judge"
  1. one of the landmarks of the boundary of Zebulun; site unknown

Origin: from H6256 and H7011

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
